candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; best representation of total sales.
Operating profit, not revenue; downstream in P&L, so not appropriate for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used as top-line revenue.
Component of financial income, not total revenue from operations.
Non-operating result; not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow hedges, reclassification to income statement
candidates.why: OCI reclassification, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income to NCI, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet item, not revenue.
Unearned income liability, not revenue line.
Direct costs of materials and services; best proxy for cost of sales/COGS.
More likely SG&A/overhead; may contain indirect operating expenses rather than direct COGS.
Aggregate operating overhead; too broad and likely includes SG&A, not pure COGS.
Net operating result, not a cost component.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Financial items, not COGS.
Result of discontinued ops, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D grants offset; not COGS.
R&D expense, not general COGS.
Capitalized R&D, not COGS.
Balance sheet asset, not cost line.
Liability, not cost line.
Operating income, not expense; should not be included in SG&A expenses.

candidates.row_label: Salaries, wages and social security costs
candidates.why: Personnel and admin-related expenses; classic SG&A component. Appears twice but with same label; include once per rules.
Compensation-related overhead; typically included in SG&A.
Likely selling & administrative/overhead costs excluding COGS, D&A, etc.; good SG&A bucket.
Generic operating overhead bucket; useful SG&A component especially when others may be incomplete in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Salaries, wages and social security costs

variables.notes: Excluded 'Other Operating Income' because SG&A should include expenses, not income.

candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; part of R&D-related expense but not the full R&D effort.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: Grants offset against R&D; should be considered if modeling net R&D, but on its own not the gross expense.
Explicit R&D expense line; primary choice for R&D expense.
Capitalized portion of R&D; relevant to total R&D effort in addition to expensed portion.
Balance sheet gross R&D asset; not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated balance sheet adjustment; not current-period expense.

final_choice.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered to reflect gross R&D (expensed + capitalized) with grants as an offset if used.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; net of capitalized interest, ideal for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; secondary interest expense component if main interest line is unavailable.
Minority interest share of income, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure mirroring the main lease interest line; use main line first.
Interest-earning asset, not expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity for minority shareholders, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provided multiple labels as a priority list for interest expense over time.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit (loss) equity accounted investees
candidates.why: Income from associates, not equity balance.
OCI from associates, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent
candidates.why: Equity attributable to owners of the parent; ideal for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes both parent and non-controlling interests; only fallback if parent-only equity not available.
Technical balancing line, not an economic equity measure.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not pure equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to minorities, not the equity balance itself.
Balance sheet line for minority shareholders’ equity; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests; appears to duplicate same figures, useful as fallback.
Income statement minority interest, not balance sheet amount.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income to minorities, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not minority equity.

variables.notes: Two equivalent balance sheet labels are provided as a priority list in case of changes in reporting terminology over time.
